fields.title: extension: inject skill instructions before agent_start (codex-style)
fields.description:
Implement skill injection at send-time.

Approach:
- Use before_agent_start event to detect explicit mentions of $skill tokens in the prompt.
- For each resolved skill, read SKILL.md and inject a separate custom message into the turn context containing one or more <skill> blocks.
- Do NOT inline-expand the user prompt text; keep marker or strip per spec task.

Injected message format should include name + path + contents (codex-inspired), e.g.:
<skill>
<name>beads</name>
<path>/abs/.../SKILL.md</path>
...contents...
</skill>

DoD:
- With $skill mention, a custom message is added before the user message reaches the model.
- Supports multiple $skills in one prompt (deduped)
- Unknown skill leaves prompt unchanged + user notified (or silent) per spec.
- Escaped \$skill is not injected.
fields.close_reason: Implemented before_agent_start skill injection as separate <skill> blocks
